name: python3-isoduration
title: python3-isoduration
description:
Operations with ISO 8601 durations (Python 3 package)
ISO 8601 supports time durations in string format, for example
"P3Y6M4DT12H30M5S" represents a duration of 3 years, 6 months, 4 days,
12 hours, 30 minutes, and 5 seconds. This package supports working
with such durations, addressing the shortcomings of the isodate package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-isoduration because Operations with ISO 8601 durations (Python 3 package).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-isoduration as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-isoduration with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-isoduration --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
